title: Bootloader + docs alignment
summary: Fixed context_manifest.yaml path mismatch in bootloader (was N5/config/, now correctly N5/prefs/). All referenced files verified to exist.

changes.description: Changed validation command from 'cat N5/config/context_manifest.yaml' to 'cat N5/prefs/context_manifest.yaml'

notes: Placeholders [TODAY] and [TO BE SET] in prefs.md template are intentional - filled by PERSONALIZE prompt
The shipped context_manifest.yaml in N5/prefs/ is more complete than the inline template was
Install instructions doc (Documents/n5os-ode-install-instructions.md) has no path conflicts
